title: View of Workspaces
excerpt: It would be really great if the window that shows all available workspaces expanded down the length of the column required to show ALL workspaces in one glance meaning you do not have to use the scroll function to see th…

posts.author: Rach_Hewitt (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be really great if the window that shows all available workspaces expanded down the length of the column required to show ALL workspaces in one glance meaning you do not have to use the scroll function to see the bottom ones. It is quite an inefficient use of time when you have more than 5 workspaces to look at…
Thanks Team!
